strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading technique in the needle driver
Showed understanding of extracorporeal knot tying fundamentals
weaknesses: Unable to assess performance due to tutorial format rather than timed attempt
No clear demonstration of complete task execution from start to finish
Cannot evaluate accuracy or efficiency metrics without proper performance structure

drills.name: Complete task execution drill
drills.description: Perform full task4 attempts with clear start and end points, focusing on smooth transitions from needle pass to knot completion.
drills.targets_weakness: Lack of complete task demonstration structure.

drills.name: Timed performance assessment
drills.description: Execute task4 with deliberate timing markers - start when instruments enter field, end when suture is cut.

progression_note: At the advanced level, focus on converting your technical knowledge into consistent, measurable performance attempts that can be properly evaluated against FLS benchmarks.
